# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Flexible Build and Deploy

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      custom_commands:
        description: 'Custom commands to execute'
        required: false
        type: string

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: self-hosted
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v3
      
      - name: Run custom build script
        run: |
          if [ -f "./build.sh" ]; then
            chmod +x ./build.sh
            ./build.sh
          fi
      
      - name: Run custom deployment script
        run: |
          if [ -f "./deploy.sh" ]; then
            chmod +x ./deploy.sh
            ./deploy.sh
          fi
      
      - name: Execute workflow dispatch commands
        if: github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && github.event.inputs.custom_commands != ''
        run: |
          ${{ github.event.inputs.custom_commands }}
      
      - name: Run additional custom commands
        run: |
          if [ -f "./custom-commands.sh" ]; then
            chmod +x ./custom-commands.sh
            ./custom-commands.sh
          fi
